response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical fundamentals with 20+ years of diverse engineering experience and an MIT degree, making him capable of learning rapidly. However, the role explicitly requires AI/ML expertise and demonstrated strategic influence in AI-powered products—areas largely absent from his resume. His recent work on AI infrastructure at re:cinq is too new to assess whether it represents the deep AI strategy capabilities needed for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure systems with demonstrated mastery of multiple languages and frameworks
Proven entrepreneurial leadership through founding GISCollective and contributing to early-stage ventures like Apon and RIDE Capital
Strong technical foundation from MIT with ability to quickly acquire expertise in new domains and technical leadership through organizing workshops and community engagement
concerns: Minimal demonstrated expertise in AI and machine learning—the core focus area of this strategic role
Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq (2 months) is too new to evidence deep AI strategy capabilities or customer advisory experience required for the position

Career trajectory shows strong individual contributor and product engineering work, but limited evidence of director-level strategic influence, cloud platform strategy, or advising customers on cutting-edge technology adoption
